no: Saradas Magic BG2 seems the new spells it adds can cause conflict issues In BG1, he’s in the Friendly Arm Inn’s temple and sells some unique spells.Install Saradas Magic after EET Start.Install Saradas Magic before Saradas Magic II then Mazzy Megamod.
sum: Saradas Magic for BGEE / EET / BGT introduces a new non-playable NPC

co.n: Saradas Magic for BGEE / EET / BGT
